highlights: Designed and implemented a new routing rule engine which evaluated tenant defined rules against requests to define new route targets, significantly expanding customer capabilities and framework parity
Developed workarounds to upgrade deep Rust dependencies to resolve issues that had been pending for months, allowing the deletion of significant feature flagged customer-specific code
Designed solution to overcome bottleneck and increase maximum customer deployment throughput by over 100x
Designed and implemented a new API (build and runtime logic for the Amplify.js framework) for customers to model generated SQL fields.
Designed and implemented a pipeline for website telemetry data
Optimized CI pipeline, reducing deployment time by as much as 50%
Started and operated a boat rental business in upstate NY
Built and managed online reservation system, payments, book-keeping, boating, etc..
Hosted dinners and cocktail parties with atheletes, financiers, and leaders in business and politics
